title: crenularia umbellata
intro: Crenularia umbellata is a type of flowering plant, also known as the 'marsh marigold' or 'kingcup', which belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Crenularia umbellata include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing, making it a popular natural remedy for minor cuts and scrapes. Crenularia umbellata can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to support skin health and well-being.
